{{Infobox
|image_url=https://raw.githubusercontent.com/PixelGuys/Cubyz/refs/tags/0.2.0/assets/cubyz/blocks/textures/basalt/base.png
|block_health=30
|block_resistance=1
|rotation=stairs
|durability=75
|mass_damage=2.0
|hardness_damage=4
|swing_speed=2.9
|tags=stone, basalt
|modifiers=good_at
}}



== Obtaining ==
Basalt can be found on volcanoes and in basalt caves.

== Usage ==
Basalt is able to be used in tool crafting.

Basalt can be crafted into bricks, tiles, and walls for decorative purposes.

== History ==

* [[0.0.0]] - Added to the game

== Trivia ==
{{Stub|section}}

[[Category:Blocks]]
[[Category:Materials]]
[[Category:Stone]]
